title: Nowega Begins Filling 55km Section of GermanyГўв‚¬в„ўs Core Hydrogen Network
content: Nowega has started filling a 55km hydrogen pipeline in Germany, part of the 9,000km Hydrogen Core Network (HCN). Located between Lingen and Bad Bentheim, the pipeline uses 95% repurposed infrastructure and begins with 28,500 cubic meters of hydrogen at 3 bar. It will connect to RWEГўв‚¬в„ўs 300MW electrolyser in Lingen, with TotalEnergies securing a 15-year hydrogen supply for its Leuna refinery. The project, expandable southwards in late 2025, supports GermanyГўв‚¬в„ўs sustainable hydrogen goals, backed by a recent government loan and a ГўвЂљВ¬25/kWh/h usage rate. Meanwhile, GascadeГўв‚¬в„ўs 1,630km Flow project also advances the HCN using repurposed gas pipelines.
author: Analysts Account
